name: agenticflow-plugin
description: AgenticFlow developer tools for OpenAI Codex — build AI agents, deploy multi-agent workforces, and automate operations against the AgenticFlow platform via the `af` CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Build AI agents and multi-agent workforces via the `af` CLI.
interface.longDescription: Operate the AgenticFlow platform end-to-end from your editor: run `af bootstrap --json` to orient, deploy a pre-built multi-agent team with `af workforce init --blueprint <id> --json`, iterate surgically with `af agent update --patch`, inspect MCP tool providers with `af mcp-clients inspect` before attaching them, and validate payload shapes with `af schema <resource> --field <name>`. Ships with 3 flagship skills (workforce, agent, mcp) plus a reference library covering CLI setup, packs, glossary, and troubleshooting.
defaultPrompt: Set up an AI agent that answers customer questions about my SaaS product
Deploy a 5-agent Amazon Singapore seller team with the amazon-seller blueprint
Build a research-then-write multi-agent workforce with a researcher and a writer
Attach a Google Sheets MCP client to my agent so it can log each result
Iterate on an agent's system prompt without touching its attached tools
